summary: Anthropic details Claude Code's origin and containment strategies; OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 models in GitHub Copilot; ADK Go 2.0 introduces graph-based workflows; AWS MCP Server adds OAuth; new infra primitives for sandboxing, evaluation, and memory emerge. | Agent sandboxing and security dominate discussion, with first agentic ransomware (JADEPUFFER) confirmed. Anthropic faces a China security backdoor warning. OpenAI's Codex undergoes regression. Quarkus graph-MCP workflow yields efficiency gains. Agent evals and memory for browser agents gain traction.

candidates.title: Anthropic publishes inside story of Claude Code's development
candidates.why_it_matters: Official narrative from researchers and early users on how the CLI became a coding agent.

candidates.title: Anthropic shares containment strategies for Claude across products
candidates.why_it_matters: Engineering details on capping agent blast radius for claude.ai and Claude Code.

candidates.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, Luna available in GitHub Copilot
candidates.why_it_matters: New model family lands in Copilot; Sol, Terra, Luna names suggest tiered capabilities.

candidates.title: Google announces ADK Go 2.0 with graph-based workflow engine
candidates.why_it_matters: New multi-agent framework with built-in human-in-the-loop and graph workflows.

candidates.title: AWS MCP Server adds OAuth support
candidates.why_it_matters: Enables secure delegated access for MCP-based agent tool calls to AWS services.

candidates.title: OpenAI Codex releases v0.144.0, v0.144.1, and v0.145.0-alpha.2
candidates.why_it_matters: Multiple rapid releases indicate active development on the coding agent CLI.

candidates.title: OpenAI blog: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
candidates.why_it_matters: Methodology for reliable coding agent benchmarks; impacts eval best practices.

candidates.title: Mitos: millisecond microVM sandbox forking for AI agents on K8s
candidates.why_it_matters: Firecracker-based sandbox with memory snapshots and durable workspaces for agent isolation.

candidates.title: Airut: run Claude Code tasks from email and Slack with container isolation
candidates.why_it_matters: Secure foundation for autonomous agentic development with workspace provisioning and sandboxing.

candidates.title: entropy-loop-core: failure compiler for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Turns agent failures into lessons and replayable regression cases for CI.

candidates.title: Mora: local-first zero-egress memory for MCP agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Entity graph + daily brief from Gmail/Calendar/iMessage; privacy-preserving agent memory.

candidates.title: Forge Agent Gate: mandate gate and proof trail for consequential agent actions
candidates.why_it_matters: Open MIT gateway + MCP server for refunds, payments, approvals; addresses agent safety.
